raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Morning motivation","name":"What usually influences your morning motivation and energy levels?","description":"Explores underlying factors affecting their timeliness, succeed.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Work rhythm","name":"Does your current work schedule fit well with your natural opportunities","name":"Where do you see opportunities for growth in your current role?","description":"Encourages them to identify areas for professional development and learning.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Design focus","name":"Which design project are you most excited about right now, and why?","description":"Uncovers what aspects of their work are engaging and motivating them.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Energy drivers","name":"What typically boosts your energy levels during a workday?","description":"Identifies factors that positively influence their energy, aiding in sustainability.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Role clarity","name":"Is there anything unclear about your role or expectations this week?","description":"Checks if there are any uncertainties in their role or workload expectations.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Upcoming challenges","name":"What challenges do you foresee in your upcoming design work?","description":"Encourages them to anticipate and articulate potential obstacles.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Priority alignment","name":"Do your current project priorities align with your personal career goals?","description":"Explores alignment between their work and personal career objectives.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]}]}
